title: Travel Dates 2026-2027
content:
Anticipated Travel Dates for 2026-2027 (arrivals & departures)
Wednesday, August 12, 2026
Student leaders and select varsity athletes move in.
All students are required to attend the end of year ceremonies including commencement.
Students may depart campus after their last commitment on Saturday, May 29, 2027

| Orientation & Move In – August 15 & 16, 2026 Orientation programming for ALL boarding students and families on August 15. Orientation programming for ALL students and families on August 16. MOVE-IN: All boarding students on August 15. Family Day Activities– October 2, 2026 Fall Break – October 5-7, 2026 Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, October 2. |
| --- |
| Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Wednesday, October 7. Classes will resume on Thursday, October 8. Thanksgiving Break - November 23-27, 2026 Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, November 20. Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Sunday, November 29. Classes resume on Monday, November 30. Winter Break - December 21, 2026 – January 1, 2027 Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, December 18. |
| Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Monday, January 4. Classes resume on Tuesday, January 5. February Break - February 15-17, 2027 Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, February 12. Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Wednesday, February 17. Classes resume on Thursday, February 18. Spring Break – March29 – April 9, 2027 |
| Students leave campus after their last commitment on Friday, March 26. Boarders return between 3:00 p.m. and 9:00 p.m. on Sunday, April 11. Classes resume on Monday, April 12. End of 2026-2027 Academic Year Last day of academic program for grades 9-11 is Thursday, May 27, 2027, at 2:00 p.m. All students are required to attend the Recognition Ceremony and Candlelight taking place on Friday, May 28, 2027. Commencement is Saturday, May 29, 2027. |
